examples.en: He joined the army after graduating from high school.
examples.zh: 他高中畢業後加入陸軍。

examples.en: The army held a parade in the capital.
examples.zh: 軍隊在首都舉行了閱兵。

examples.en: Her brother serves in the navy.
examples.zh: 她哥哥在海軍服役。

examples.en: The navy protects the country's coastline.
examples.zh: 海軍保護國家的海岸線。

examples.en: The air force conducted a training flight.
examples.zh: 空軍進行了一次訓練飛行。

examples.en: He always dreamed of joining the air force.
examples.zh: 他一直夢想加入空軍。

examples.en: The soldier stood guard at the gate.
examples.zh: 那名士兵在大門站崗。

examples.en: Each soldier carried a heavy backpack.
examples.zh: 每名士兵都背著沉重的背包。

examples.en: The officer gave orders to the troops.
examples.zh: 那名軍官向部隊下達命令。

examples.en: She was promoted to a senior officer.
examples.zh: 她被晉升為高階軍官。

examples.en: The general reviewed the troops before the ceremony.
examples.zh: 將軍在典禮前檢閱部隊。

examples.en: A four-star general led the operation.
examples.zh: 一位四星上將領導這次行動。

examples.en: The captain led his unit through the exercise.
examples.zh: 上尉帶領他的部隊完成演習。

examples.en: The ship's captain gave clear instructions.
examples.zh: 艦長下達了明確的指示。

examples.en: The sergeant trained the new recruits.
examples.zh: 士官訓練新兵。

examples.en: A sergeant supervised the drill.
examples.zh: 一名中士監督操練。

examples.en: The lieutenant reported to the captain.
examples.zh: 中尉向上尉報告。

examples.en: A young lieutenant commanded the platoon.
examples.zh: 一位年輕的中尉指揮這個排。

examples.en: The colonel planned the training schedule.
examples.zh: 上校規劃了訓練時程。

examples.en: A colonel addressed the assembled troops.
examples.zh: 一位上校對集合的部隊講話。

examples.en: The new recruit learned to march.
examples.zh: 新兵學習行進。

examples.en: The army tries to recruit young volunteers.
examples.zh: 軍隊試圖招募年輕的志願者。

img: new recruits in a training line

examples.en: The troops arrived at the base at dawn.
examples.zh: 部隊在黎明時抵達基地。

examples.en: Fresh troops replaced the tired ones.
examples.zh: 生力軍替換了疲憊的部隊。

img: column of troops on the move

examples.en: His unit was assigned to guard the bridge.
examples.zh: 他的分隊被指派守衛橋樑。

examples.en: Each unit has its own commander.
examples.zh: 每個單位都有自己的指揮官。

examples.en: The platoon set up camp near the river.
examples.zh: 這個排在河邊紮營。

examples.en: A platoon usually has about thirty soldiers.
examples.zh: 一個排通常約有三十名士兵。

img: platoon of soldiers setting up camp

examples.en: The brigade took part in the joint exercise.
examples.zh: 該旅參加了聯合演習。

examples.en: A brigade is made up of several battalions.
examples.zh: 一個旅由數個營組成。

examples.en: The soldiers returned to the base after the mission.
examples.zh: 士兵們在任務後返回基地。

examples.en: The military base is located near the coast.
examples.zh: 這座軍事基地位於海岸附近。

examples.en: The recruits sleep in the barracks.
examples.zh: 新兵們睡在營房裡。

examples.en: The barracks were kept clean and tidy.
examples.zh: 營房保持得乾淨整潔。

img: rows of bunk beds in barracks

examples.en: Every weapon must be cleaned after use.
examples.zh: 每件武器使用後都必須清潔。

examples.en: The museum displays old weapons.
examples.zh: 博物館展示古老的武器。

img: military weapons on a display rack

examples.en: The soldier cleaned his rifle carefully.
examples.zh: 士兵仔細清理他的步槍。

examples.en: They practiced shooting with a rifle.
examples.zh: 他們用步槍練習射擊。

examples.en: The tank moved slowly across the field.
examples.zh: 坦克緩緩地駛過田野。

examples.en: A tank is protected by thick armor.
examples.zh: 坦克受到厚重裝甲的保護。

examples.en: The missile was launched during the test.
examples.zh: 飛彈在測試中發射。

examples.en: A defense missile can intercept threats.
examples.zh: 防禦飛彈可以攔截威脅。

examples.en: The artillery was positioned on the hill.
examples.zh: 火砲部署在山丘上。

examples.en: Modern artillery can hit distant targets.
examples.zh: 現代火砲能命中遠距離目標。

examples.en: The old cannon stood at the fort's entrance.
examples.zh: 那座舊大砲立在堡壘入口。

examples.en: They fired the cannon during the ceremony.
examples.zh: 他們在典禮中發射了大砲。

img: antique iron cannon at a fort

examples.en: The recruits practiced throwing a grenade.
examples.zh: 新兵練習投擲手榴彈。

examples.en: A grenade must be handled with great care.
examples.zh: 手榴彈必須非常小心地處理。

examples.en: Every soldier wears a helmet for safety.
examples.zh: 每名士兵為了安全都戴頭盔。

examples.en: His helmet protected him from the fall.
examples.zh: 他的頭盔在跌倒時保護了他。

examples.en: The soldiers wore matching uniforms.
examples.zh: 士兵們穿著一致的軍服。

examples.en: She ironed her uniform before the parade.
examples.zh: 她在閱兵前燙好了制服。

examples.en: The vehicle's armor stopped the impact.
examples.zh: 車輛的裝甲擋住了衝擊。

examples.en: Body armor helps protect the soldiers.
examples.zh: 防彈衣有助於保護士兵。

examples.en: The guard raised his shield for protection.
examples.zh: 守衛舉起盾牌防護。

examples.en: The wall acted as a shield against wind.
examples.zh: 那道牆起到擋風的作用。

examples.en: The radar detected the incoming plane.
examples.zh: 雷達偵測到飛來的飛機。

examples.en: A radar station monitors the airspace.
examples.zh: 一座雷達站監控著空域。

examples.en: The submarine dived below the surface.
examples.zh: 潛水艇潛入水面下方。

examples.en: A submarine can stay underwater for days.
examples.zh: 潛水艇可以在水下停留數天。

examples.en: The aircraft took off from the carrier.
examples.zh: 飛機從航空母艦上起飛。

examples.en: Several aircraft joined the flyover.
examples.zh: 數架飛機參加了飛行表演。

examples.en: The aircraft carrier sailed across the ocean.
examples.zh: 航空母艦航行過海洋。

examples.en: Planes land on the deck of the carrier.
examples.zh: 飛機降落在航母的甲板上。

img: aircraft carrier with jets on deck

examples.en: The fleet gathered near the harbor.
examples.zh: 艦隊在港口附近集結。

examples.en: A large fleet sailed on the exercise.
examples.zh: 一支龐大的艦隊出海演習。

examples.en: The commanders discussed their strategy.
examples.zh: 指揮官們討論他們的戰略。

examples.en: A good strategy can save many lives.
examples.zh: 良好的戰略可以拯救許多生命。

examples.en: They changed their tactic during the drill.
examples.zh: 他們在演習中改變了戰術。

examples.en: This tactic worked well in the exercise.
examples.zh: 這個戰術在演習中效果很好。

examples.en: The country spends a lot on defense.
examples.zh: 這個國家在國防上花費很多。

examples.en: Good defense keeps the border safe.
examples.zh: 良好的防禦讓邊境安全。

examples.en: The team completed the mission on time.
examples.zh: 隊伍準時完成了任務。

examples.en: Their mission was to guard the supplies.
examples.zh: 他們的任務是守衛補給品。

examples.en: The soldiers went on patrol at night.
examples.zh: 士兵們在夜間出去巡邏。

examples.en: A patrol checks the border every day.
examples.zh: 巡邏隊每天檢查邊境。

examples.en: The general is in command of the base.
examples.zh: 將軍指揮這座基地。

examples.en: The soldiers followed the command at once.
examples.zh: 士兵們立刻服從命令。

examples.en: The commander praised his team's effort.
examples.zh: 指揮官讚揚他團隊的努力。

examples.en: A commander must make quick decisions.
examples.zh: 指揮官必須做出快速的決定。

examples.en: The soldiers did a morning drill.
examples.zh: 士兵們進行了晨間操練。

examples.en: A fire drill was held at the base.
examples.zh: 基地舉行了一次消防演練。

examples.en: The two armies joined a training exercise.
examples.zh: 兩支軍隊參加了一次訓練演習。

examples.en: The exercise lasted for three days.
examples.zh: 這次演習持續了三天。

examples.en: The troops practiced a difficult maneuver.
examples.zh: 部隊練習了一項困難的調度動作。

examples.en: The maneuver required careful timing.
examples.zh: 這項演習動作需要精確的時間掌握。

examples.en: The unit had to retreat to safer ground.
examples.zh: 該分隊不得不撤退到更安全的地方。

examples.en: The retreat was carried out in good order.
examples.zh: 撤退進行得井然有序。

examples.en: The troops advanced toward the hill.
examples.zh: 部隊向山丘推進。

examples.en: Their advance was slow but steady.
examples.zh: 他們的推進緩慢但穩定。

examples.en: They sent more troops to reinforce the base.
examples.zh: 他們派出更多部隊增援基地。

examples.en: The wall was reinforced with steel.
examples.zh: 那道牆用鋼材加固了。

examples.en: The veteran shared stories of his service.
examples.zh: 這位退伍軍人分享他服役的故事。

examples.en: Many veterans attended the memorial.
examples.zh: 許多退伍軍人參加了紀念活動。

examples.en: Guards watch the border day and night.
examples.zh: 衛兵日夜看守邊境。

examples.en: The two countries share a long border.
examples.zh: 這兩個國家有一條長長的國界。

examples.en: A guard stood at the entrance all night.
examples.zh: 一名守衛整夜站在入口處。

examples.en: Soldiers guard the important building.
examples.zh: 士兵守衛著這座重要的建築。

examples.en: The soldiers wore camouflage in the forest.
examples.zh: 士兵們在森林裡穿著迷彩服。

examples.en: Good camouflage helps them stay hidden.
examples.zh: 良好的偽裝幫助他們隱藏行蹤。
